require 'array'
require 'queue'

def solve(grid : Array(Array(Int64)), k : Int64) : Int64
    m = grid.size
    n = grid[0].size
    count = 0
    dx = [-1, 0, 1, 0]
    dy = [0, 1, 0, -1]
    for i in 0...m
        for j in 0...n
            if grid[i][j] > 0
                q = Queue.new
                q.push([i, j])
                sum = grid[i][j]
                grid[i][j] = 0
                while !q.empty?
                    x, y = q.pop
                    for d in 0..3
                        nx = x + dx[d]
                        ny = y + dy[d]
                        if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && grid[nx][ny] > 0
                            sum += grid[nx][ny]
                            grid[nx][ny] = 0
                            q.push([nx, ny])
                        end
                    end
                end
                if sum % k == 0
                    count += 1
                end
            end
        end
    end
    count
end
```
